title: Outlook Integration Update One Item/Project at a time
excerpt: We have a board for our management company with a list of 50 projects on it. We’d like to use the Outlook > Monday.com integration to automate updates via email. However - we don’t find it useful that the integration upd…

posts.author: Jcomer (Jeremiah Comer)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a board for our management company with a list of 50 projects on it. We’d like to use the Outlook > Monday.com integration to automate updates via email. However - we don’t find it useful that the integration updates every single item on our project list.

We would like an option to choose to add an automation formula to one specific item. We do not want to have to create a new board for every single project as that would just be too much work!

Support informed me this wasn’t possible, so I am submitting feedback. Thanks!
